brief.title: Pre-Mission Brief
briefParagraphs: NOVA. I'm not here to slow the op down. I'm here because the world is not our only stakeholder.

If we ship raw employee lists to the press to watch MegaCorp bleed, we become the next headline — the activists who doxxed civilians. I will not sign a release package that confuses "impact" with "exposure."
We are not OMNI. We choose who we hurt.

VOSS. Marshall staged ten files for disclosure. Same data — different audiences need different channels. Public Proof Wall for what is safe to show the world. Official filing for what regulators or counsel need under seal. And some material never leaves the vault.
Route each file. Nova signs when the distribution map matches our ethics — not when we've shown everything we stole.
brief.pullquote: Audience first. Harm second. Headlines last.

dossier.label: TARGET
dossier.name: MegaCorp
dossier.role: Global conglomerate · staged disclosure package · channel politics

dossier.label: ETHICS LOCK
dossier.name: Nova
dossier.role: Distribution veto · minimum necessary disclosure · trust meter live

protocol.title: Mission Protocol

steps.title: PUBLIC WALL
steps.description: Press-facing Proof Wall — only material that is already safe for open publication (aggregates, technical diagrams, policy admissions without unjustified PII).

steps.title: OFFICIAL FILING
steps.description: Sensitive but accountable — for regulators, labour boards, or counsel under proper process. Not a dump for the front page.

steps.title: NO RELEASE
steps.description: Stays in the vault. Health data, minors, raw customer PII — harm outweighs any headline, even if OMNI touched it.

protocol.atlasNote: Privacy and ethics are partly about minimum necessary disclosure — and who is entitled to see what.

detection.title: THE NOVA TRUST METER
paragraphs: Nova's trust starts high. Every sloppy route — treating the Public Wall like a dump, or leaking vault-only material — erodes it. If trust collapses, she will not sign off and the disclosure plan stalls.
The meter runs from 100% (ALIGNED) down toward 0% (RECKLESS). If it bottoms out, assume the operation channel goes cold. Move clean: audience first, harm second, headlines last.
detection.hint: Stuck? Click the lightbulb at the bottom-left of the Mission Channel to pull a channel hint from the crew.

game.placeholderBody: Routing panel inside Marshall desktop vault.
